metric.name: expected_loss_amount
metric.description: Expected credit loss calculated from exposure at default, probability of default, and loss given default across loan source populations.

dialects.expression: retail_loans.principal_amount * retail_loans.pd * retail_loans.lgd + institutional_loans.notional_amount * institutional_loans.probability_default * institutional_loans.loss_given_default

metric.description: Risk-weighted exposure amount calculated by applying default probability to retail principal and institutional notional amounts.

dataset.loan_exposure_report_lines.name: loan_exposure_report_lines
dataset.loan_exposure_report_lines.description: Prepared loan exposure report line records at reportable loan grain, carrying normalized borrower, product, amount, currency, and expected loss fields consumed by regulatory reporting logic.

fields.name: loan_id
fields.description: Normalized loan or facility identifier reported on the exposure line.

fields.name: borrower_id
fields.description: Borrower identifier reported on the exposure line for reconciliation to customer master.

fields.name: borrower_country
fields.description: Borrower country carried on the report line to support jurisdictional aggregation and composite joins.

fields.name: product_id
fields.description: Product identifier reported on the exposure line for product-class aggregation.

fields.name: principal_amount
fields.description: Principal amount included on the report line for exposure reconciliation.

fields.name: exposure_at_default_amount
fields.description: Exposure at default amount reported for regulatory credit risk measurement.

fields.name: expected_loss_amount

dialects.expression: retail_loans.principal_amount * retail_loans.pd * retail_loans.lgd + institutional_loans.notional_amount * institutional_loans.probability_default * institutional_loans.loss_given_default

fields.description: Expected loss amount reported after applying probability of default and loss given default.

fields.name: report_currency
fields.description: Currency code in which the exposure line amounts are reported.

value.description: Prepared report-line dataset is produced by a documented query that normalizes retail loan and institutional facility source populations before reporting.
value.sql:
select loan_id, borrower_id, borrower_country, product_id, principal_amount, exposure_at_default_amount, expected_loss_amount, report_currency
from credit_risk_engine.loan_exposure_report_lines
where report_date = :report_date

columns.name: loan_id
columns.description: Retail source identifier for an individual consumer loan record.

columns.name: borrower_id
columns.description: Customer identifier linking the retail loan to the responsible borrower.

columns.name: product_id
columns.description: Product identifier classifying the retail lending product.

columns.name: origination_date
columns.description: Date on which the retail loan was originated or booked.

columns.name: principal_amount
columns.description: Principal balance or contractual amount recorded for the retail loan.

columns.name: currency
columns.description: Currency code used for the retail loan amount.

columns.name: pd
columns.description: Probability of default assigned by the retail credit risk model.

columns.name: lgd
columns.description: Loss given default rate assigned by the retail credit risk model.

columns.name: product_id
columns.description: Master product identifier for a lending product.

columns.name: product_type
columns.description: Lending product type such as mortgage, term loan, revolving credit, or credit line.

columns.name: regulatory_product_class
columns.description: Regulatory product class used for credit exposure aggregation.

column.retail_lending_core.retail_loans..name: lgd
column.retail_lending_core.retail_loans..description: Loss given default rate assigned by the retail credit risk model.

metric.expected_loss_amount.name: expected_loss_amount
metric.expected_loss_amount.description: Expected credit loss calculated from exposure at default, probability of default, and loss given default across loan source populations.
metric.expected_loss_amount.expression: retail_loans.principal_amount * retail_loans.pd * retail_loans.lgd + institutional_loans.notional_amount * institutional_loans.probability_default * institutional_loans.loss_given_default

metric.name: expected_loss_amount
metric.description: Expected credit loss calculated from exposure at default, probability of default, and loss given default across loan source populations.

dialects.expression: retail_loans.principal_amount * retail_loans.pd * retail_loans.lgd + institutional_loans.notional_amount * institutional_loans.probability_default * institutional_loans.loss_given_default

metric.risk_weighted_exposure_amount.name: risk_weighted_exposure_amount
metric.risk_weighted_exposure_amount.description: Risk-weighted exposure amount calculated by applying default probability to retail principal and institutional notional amounts.

metric.name: risk_weighted_exposure_amount
metric.description: Risk-weighted exposure amount calculated by applying default probability to retail principal and institutional notional amounts.

requirement.item.name: 贷款风险暴露报送需求
requirement.item.description: 监管/BRD要求按日生成贷款风险暴露报送数据，用于说明每笔零售或机构贷款在报告日的借款人、产品、本金、风险暴露和预期损失口径。需求还要求在日终前完成数据生成、业务复核、异常说明和报送留痕；这些非数据类要求保留在说明中，不强行建模为字段。
requirement.item.source: Loan Credit Exposure Reporting BRD v1.0 section 5.2
requirement.item.SLA: Daily EOD before 22:00 local time; credit risk review completed before regulatory submission.

concepts.name: Loan
concepts.description: 需求需要 Loan 作为贷款风险暴露的核心语义对象，用于表达每笔零售或机构贷款的标识、本金、风险暴露和预期损失口径。

concepts.name: Borrower
concepts.description: 需求需要 Borrower 作为承担还款责任的客户或法律实体语义对象，用于说明每笔贷款暴露归属的借款人。

concepts.name: LoanProduct
concepts.description: 需求需要 LoanProduct 作为贷款产品语义对象，用于按监管产品类别解释和汇总贷款风险暴露。

required_fields.name: 贷款标识
required_fields.description: 需求需要贷款标识，用于唯一识别每条报送贷款或授信并支持行级对账。

required_fields.name: 借款人标识
required_fields.description: 需求需要借款人标识，用于将贷款暴露归属到承担还款责任的客户或法律实体。

required_fields.name: 产品标识
required_fields.description: 需求需要产品标识，用于按照监管产品类别汇总贷款风险暴露。

required_fields.name: 本金金额
required_fields.description: 需求需要本金金额，用于作为贷款风险暴露和预期损失计算的基础金额。

required_fields.name: 风险暴露金额
required_fields.description: 需求需要风险暴露金额，用于展示监管口径下违约时风险暴露规模。

controls.name: loan_identifier_present
controls.rule: Loan identifier must be present for every report line.

controls.name: borrower_identifier_present
controls.rule: Borrower identifier must be present for every report line.

required_fields.name: 贷款标识
required_fields.description: 需求需要贷款标识，用于唯一识别每条报送贷款或授信并支持行级对账。

required_fields.name: 产品标识
required_fields.description: 需求需要产品标识，用于按照监管产品类别汇总贷款风险暴露。

required_fields.name: 本金金额
required_fields.description: 需求需要本金金额，用于作为贷款风险暴露和预期损失计算的基础金额。

required_fields.name: 风险暴露金额
required_fields.description: 需求需要风险暴露金额，用于展示监管口径下违约时风险暴露规模。

calculations.name: 预期损失金额
calculations.description: 需求需要预期损失金额，用于按风险暴露金额、违约概率和违约损失率计算监管信用风险损失。

requirement_item..Loan.has_LoanIdentifie.description: 需求需要贷款标识，用于唯一识别每条报送贷款或授信并支持行级对账。

required_field.description: 需求需要产品标识，用于按照监管产品类别汇总贷款风险暴露。

required_field.name: 风险暴露金额
required_field.description: 需求需要风险暴露金额，用于展示监管口径下违约时风险暴露规模。

report_impl.item.name: 每日贷款风险暴露报表数据逻辑
report_impl.item.description: 说明每日贷款风险暴露报表字段如何从零售贷款、机构授信、借款人主数据、产品主数据和已准备的报表明细数据中取数、归一化并满足监管需求口径；该逻辑不创建或拥有物理表。
report_impl.item.implements: 贷款风险暴露报送需求

field_mappings.name: 贷款标识逻辑
field_mappings.description: 数据逻辑说明报表明细字段 loan_id 如何承载贷款标识需求，并兼容零售贷款号和机构授信号来源。

field_mappings.name: 借款人标识逻辑
field_mappings.description: 数据逻辑说明报表明细字段 borrower_id 如何承载借款人标识需求，并对齐客户主数据中的借款人记录。

field_mappings.name: 产品标识逻辑
field_mappings.description: 数据逻辑说明报表明细字段 product_id 如何承载产品标识需求，并支持与产品主数据的监管分类对齐。

field_mappings.name: 本金金额逻辑
field_mappings.description: 数据逻辑说明报表明细字段 principal_amount 如何承载本金金额需求，并统一零售本金与机构授信名义金额。

field_mappings.name: 风险暴露金额逻辑
field_mappings.description: 数据逻辑说明报表明细字段 exposure_at_default_amount 如何承载风险暴露金额需求，并作为监管信用风险计算基础。

field_mappings.name: 预期损失金额逻辑
field_mappings.description: 数据逻辑说明报表明细字段 expected_loss_amount 如何承载预期损失金额需求，并由风险暴露、违约概率和违约损失率计算得到。

dialects.expression: COALESCE(loan_exposure_report_lines.expected_loss_amount, retail_loans.principal_amount * retail_loans.pd * retail_loans.lgd, institutional_loans.notional_amount * institutional_loans.probability_default * institutional_loans.loss_given_default)
